query: vendor stale price label after purchase

checks.hypothesis: Cleanup sync does not reach or refresh the active client UI
validation_questions: What does nutInventoryData mutate on the client?
Does nutInventoryData emit ItemDataChanged or another refresh event?
Does item data update trigger existing item panel refresh?
checks.expected_runtime_relation: client inventory data delta receiver mutates local inventory/item data
falsifies_if: If nutInventoryData always triggers an item panel redraw for the affected item.
If vendor panel close always destroys all item panels before stale labels can persist.
If vendor* metadata is not actually present on the player's purchased item clientside.

checks.hypothesis: Cleanup sync does not reach or refresh the active client UI
validation_questions: How exactly is vendorTradeInterface constructed?
Which panel is the player inventory panel?
Which panel is vendor_grid_inventory?
Do either panels subscribe to item data changes?
Does panel removal trigger removeReceiverFromVendor?
checks.expected_runtime_relation: client inventory/vendor interface constructs player inventory and vendor_grid_inventory panels
falsifies_if: If nutInventoryData always triggers an item panel redraw for the affected item.
If vendor panel close always destroys all item panels before stale labels can persist.
If vendor* metadata is not actually present on the player's purchased item clientside.

checks.hypothesis: Cleanup sync does not reach or refresh the active client UI
validation_questions: Does vendor UI refresh only vendor-side item panels or also player inventory panels?
Does closing/removing the vendor panel send the cleanup message reliably?
Does updatePrice read vendor* metadata from item data?
checks.expected_runtime_relation: client vendor UI sends trade/exit and refreshes visible vendor price labels
falsifies_if: If nutInventoryData always triggers an item panel redraw for the affected item.
If vendor panel close always destroys all item panels before stale labels can persist.
If vendor* metadata is not actually present on the player's purchased item clientside.

checks.hypothesis: Cleanup sync does not reach or refresh the active client UI
validation_questions: Where is vendor presentation metadata created?
Where is vendor presentation metadata cleared?
Does cleanup happen before or after item ownership/inventory transfer?
Which receiver/client is passed into item:setData during cleanup?
checks.expected_runtime_relation: server vendor entity mutates/clears vendor item presentation metadata
falsifies_if: If nutInventoryData always triggers an item panel redraw for the affected item.
If vendor panel close always destroys all item panels before stale labels can persist.
If vendor* metadata is not actually present on the player's purchased item clientside.

checks.hypothesis: Receiver ownership mismatch during item:setData cleanup
validation_questions: What receivers does ITEM:setData use by default?
Does setData send invData immediately?
Does noSave/noCheckEntity affect persistence or network sync?
checks.expected_runtime_relation: server item data mutation persists and conditionally syncs item data
falsifies_if: If cleanup is always sent to the actual current owner of every affected item.
If purchased item metadata is cleared before ownership transfer.
If client item data receiver updates all inventory instances globally by item ID.

checks.hypothesis: Price update path refreshes vendor UI, but not necessarily player inventory UI
validation_questions: Does grid inventory panel redraw when item data changes?
Does it cache vendor price labels?
Does it read vendorSPrice/vendorBPrice during paint or only on construction?
checks.expected_runtime_relation: client grid inventory panel renders or refreshes item presentation metadata
falsifies_if: If updatePrice is called for both vendor_grid_inventory and player inventory item panels.
If purchased item panel is reconstructed immediately after trade.
If player inventory panel ignores vendor* metadata entirely.

checks.hypothesis: Storage movement forces broader panel reconstruction or item data refresh
validation_questions: Does grid inventory panel redraw when item data changes?
Does it cache vendor price labels?
Does it read vendorSPrice/vendorBPrice during paint or only on construction?
checks.expected_runtime_relation: client grid inventory panel renders or refreshes item presentation metadata
falsifies_if: If storage movement does not reconstruct the affected item panel.
If storage movement does not trigger item data resync.
If recovery is caused by vendor exit rather than storage transfer.

checks.hypothesis: Storage movement forces broader panel reconstruction or item data refresh
validation_questions: Does storage movement reconstruct item panels?
Does storage movement force full inventory data resync?
What refresh boundary explains observed stale-label recovery?

falsifies_if: If storage movement does not reconstruct the affected item panel.
